title: Completed Diaku Emblem
description: This key unlocks the entrance to Drunder, Fortress of Zek (Plane of Tactics).

title: Crystalline Globe
description: This key unlocks the door to Aerin`Dar's lair within the Plane of Valor.

title: Enchanted Ring of Torden
description: This key unlocks the portals to the four greater towers within Torden, the Bastion of Thunder.

title: Factory Code
description: This key unlocks the door to the factory at the heart of the Plane of Innovation.

requirements.label: 'Three small turns to the right on the bottommost rivet should open the door.'

title: Gem-Etched Key
description: This key unlocks the door to the mines within Vegarlson, the Earthen Badlands (Plane of Earth).

title: Keys of War
description: These keys unlock the doors within the Plane of War.

title: Lxanvom, Lower Depths Key
description: This key unlocks the portal to the lower depths of the Ruins of Lxanvom (Crypt of Decay).

title: Passkey of the Twelve
description: This key unlocks the entrance to Ragrax, Stronghold of the Twelve (Plane of Earth).

title: Ring of Marr
description: This key unlocks the entrance to the Halls of Honor.

title: Ruins of Lxanvom Key
description: This key unlocks the entrance to the Ruins of Lxanvom (Crypt of Decay).

title: Screaming Sphere
description: This key unlocks the door to Saryrn's chambers within Torment, the Plane of Pain.

title: Symbol of Torden
description: This key unlocks the portal to Karana's tower within Torden, the Bastion of Thunder.

title: Symbol of Torment
description: This key unlocks the entrance to Torment, the Plane of Pain.

title: Talisman of Thunderous Foyer
description: This key unlocks the entrance to Torden, the Bastion of Thunder.

title: Wind Etched Key
description: This key unlocks the portal to Xegony's island within Eryslai, the Kingdom of Wind (Plane of Air).

description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following quests in The Plane of War:

title: Partisan of The Plane of War
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following quests in The Plane of War:

requirements.label: Captain Flavis Stella - The Tamrel Trials

High Strategist Galben - Any Means Necessary

title: Signet of the Arcane
description: Assist Aid Grimel and Councilman Taldarius in The Plane of Knowledge:

requirements.label: Councilman Taldarius - Signet of the Arcane (or Signet of Might)

title: Conqueror of The Reef of Coirnav

requirements.label: Phase 1: a hungry, stringy, or toughened anglerfish
Phase 2: a dark, foul, or wicked anglerfish
Phase 3: a prime, prismatic, or superior anglerfish
Phase 4: a king, master, or supreme anglerfish

title: Beyond the Zekarian
description: Solve the Sphinx's riddle to gain access to the Field of Strife and the Mines of Narikor.

requirements.label: You may now enter the Field of Strife. Should you die you will be banished to Narikor.

title: Castle Rulnavis
description: Best The Judicator and use The Warlord's Blessing to gain access to Castle Rulnavis.

requirements.label: You may now enter Castle Rulnavis.

title: Castle Tamrel
description: Best The Judicator and use The Warlord's Blessing to gain access to Castle Tamrel.

requirements.label: You may now enter Castle Tamrel.

title: Savior of The Plane of War
description: This achievement is gained upon completing the following quests in The Plane of War:

requirements.label: Mercenary of The Plane of War
Partisan of The Plane of War

title: The Antechamber of Drunder
description: Gain renown with both armies of Zek to earn access to the Antechamber of Drunder.

requirements.label: You may now enter the Antechamber of Drunder.

title: The Favor of Tallon
description: Prove your worth to the army of Tallon Zek.

requirements.label: Reach maximum ally [5000] faction with Castle Rulnavis.
Reach dubious [250] faction with Castle Rulnavis.
Reach indifferent [750] faction with Castle Rulnavis.
Reach kindly [1250] faction with Castle Rulnavis.
Reach warmly [1500] faction with Castle Rulnavis.

title: The Favor of Vallon
description: Prove your worth to the army of Vallon Zek.

requirements.label: Reach maximum ally [5000] faction with Castle Tamrel.
Reach dubious [250] faction with Castle Tamrel.
Reach indifferent [750] faction with Castle Tamrel.
Reach kindly [1250] faction with Castle Tamrel.
Reach warmly [1500] faction with Castle Tamrel.
